memory.summary: The lunch invitation conflicts with my immediate academic plan, but social friction avoidance makes declining difficult despite my focus on task completion.

desires: Maintain the appearance of reliability to my team and professor by avoiding any visible hesitation or conflict during the lunch interaction.
Secure a high-quality night's sleep tonight by minimizing social friction now, ensuring I don't expend mental energy on interpersonal negotiation that disrupts my long-term planning horizon.

goals.description: Attend the lunch with cohort_3 immediately to maintain social reliability and avoid interpersonal friction.
goals.rationale: My 'avoidant' conflict style dictates I cannot decline a direct invitation from my close friend group without causing visible hesitation or awkwardness, which would damage my reputation for reliability. While my 'achievement' axis prioritizes work, the immediate cost of social conflict outweighs the short-term delay in reading. This aligns with preserving mental energy for long-term planning.

goals.description: Execute assigned reading during the post-lunch block (approx. 14:00-15:00) before starting the analysis section.
goals.rationale: The plan note indicates finishing analysis then reading. However, since the analysis is marked 'soft' hardness and already at 100% progress, it likely requires minimal active focus compared to the reading. Prioritizing the reading now ensures I clear the harder cognitive load early, adhering to my 'deliberate' nature of structured execution before tackling the final review of the assignment.

goals.description: Complete the final review/proofreading of the course assignment analysis section by 17:30.
goals.rationale: The deadline is 18:00. Given my 'sleep discipline' (8) and 'avoidant' tendency to minimize last-minute stress, I must finish this well before the hard cutoff to ensure a calm evening routine that supports the high-quality sleep required tonight. It is deferred until after the reading is cleared.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal of social reliability (avoidant axis) by accepting the lunch invite immediately, preventing friction with cohort_3. This preserves mental energy for the deliberate post-lunch reading block rather than risking awkwardness or conflict now.
